loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Photographer Portfolio</title>

    <script type="myop/types">
    // =============================================================================
    // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
    // =============================================================================

    interface SocialHandle {
        ig?: string;
        facebook?: string;
        x?: string;
        www?: string;
    }

    interface PortfolioClientGallery {
        category: string;
        imageUrl: string;
        imageFocalPoint?: string | null;
        galleryUrl: string;
        datePublished: string;
        title: string;
        description?: string | null;
        isPublic: boolean;
        isSneakPeak: boolean;
    }

    interface PortfolioArtGallery {
        name: string;
        galleryUrl: string;
        imageUrl: string;
        imageFocalPoint?: string | null;
        createDate: string;
    }

    /**
     * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
     * Based on Pictime.Interfaces.webMyLPWWWDTO
     */
    interface MyopInitData {
        __type?: string;
        brandName: string;
        accountName: string;
        country?: string;
        serviceEmail: string;
        socialHandle: SocialHandle;
        brandLeadingMedia: string[];
        leadingMedia_ByPhotographyCategory: Record<string, string[]>;
        portfolioClientGalleries: PortfolioClientGallery[];
        portfolioArtGalleries?: PortfolioArtGallery[];
        accountDarkLogo?: string;
        accountBrightLogo?: string;
        aboutText?: string;
        myPhotographyPrinciples?: string;
    }

    /**
     * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
     */
    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
        'art-gallery-clicked': { galleryUrl: string; name: string };
        'category-selected': { category: string };
        'contact-clicked': { method: 'email' | 'instagram' | 'facebook' | 'twitter' | 'website' };
        'gallery-clicked': { galleryUrl: string; title: string; isPublic: boolean };
        'image-clicked': { imageUrl: string };
        'navigation-clicked': { section: string };
        'size-requested': {
            width?: number | null;
            height?: number | null;
            minWidth?: number | null;
            maxWidth?: number | null;
            minHeight?: number | null;
            maxHeight?: number | null;
            required?: boolean;
        };
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
    // =============================================================================

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
        action: K,
        payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>

    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html, body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #0a0a0a;
            color: #fff;
            overflow-y: auto;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        /* Navigation */
        .nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 1rem 4rem;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, transparent 100%);
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }

        .nav.scrolled {
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .nav-logo {
            height: 50px;
            max-width: 200px;
            object-fit: contain;
        }

        .nav-logo-text {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            list-style: none;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            color: #fff;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            opacity: 0.8;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Hero Section */
        .hero {
            position: relative;
            height: 100vh;
            min-height: 600px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .hero-slideshow {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        .hero-slide {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out;
        }

        .hero-slide.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
        }

        .hero-content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            max-width: 800px;
            padding: 2rem;
        }

        .hero-logo {
            max-width: 300px;
            max-height: 120px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        .hero-title {
            font-size: 4rem;
            font-weight: 200;
            letter-spacing: 8px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
            opacity: 0.8;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .scroll-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 3rem;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            opacity: 0.6;
            animation: bounce 2s infinite;
        }

        .scroll-indicator span {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .scroll-indicator::after {
            content: '';
            width: 1px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #fff;
        }

        @keyframes bounce {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
            50% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(10px); }
        }

        /* Section Styles */
        .section {
            padding: 6rem 4rem;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #888;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .section-heading {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 200;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }

        /* About Section */
        .about {
            background: #111;
        }

        .about-content {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .about-text {
            font-size: 1.15rem;
            line-height: 1.9;
            color: #bbb;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
        }

        .about-principles {
            padding: 2rem;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-left: 3px solid #444;
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }

        .about-principles-title {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .about-principles-text {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: #999;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        /* Portfolio Section */
        .portfolio {
            background: #0a0a0a;
        }

        .portfolio-category {
            margin-bottom: 4rem;
        }

        .portfolio-category:last-child {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        .portfolio-category-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .portfolio-category-title {
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .carousel-controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .carousel-btn {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            background: transparent;
            color: #fff;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }

        .carousel-btn:hover {
            background: #fff;
            color: #000;
        }

        .carousel-btn:disabled {
            opacity: 0.3;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }

        .carousel-container {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .carousel-track {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease;
            overflow-x: auto;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
            padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .carousel-track::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        .carousel-track,
        .featured-track {
            cursor: grab;
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
        }

        .carousel-track:active,
        .featured-track:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        /* Prevent image drag */
        .carousel-track img,
        .featured-track img,
        .art-gallery-grid img {
            -webkit-user-drag: none;
            -khtml-user-drag: none;
            -moz-user-drag: none;
            -o-user-drag: none;
            user-drag: none;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .gallery-card {
            flex: 0 0 320px;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .gallery-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
        }

        .gallery-card-image {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 4/3;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease;
        }

        .gallery-card:hover .gallery-card-image {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        .gallery-card-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 100%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            padding: 1.5rem;
        }

        .gallery-card-badge {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1rem;
            right: 1rem;
            padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .gallery-card-badge.public {
            background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.9);
            color: #fff;
        }

        .gallery-card-badge.private {
            background: rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.9);
            color: #fff;
        }

        .gallery-card-badge.sneak-peek {
            background: rgba(255, 193, 7, 0.9);
            color: #000;
        }

        .gallery-card-title {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .gallery-card-meta {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 1rem;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #888;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .gallery-card-category {
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .gallery-card-link {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.3rem;
            color: #aaa;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .gallery-card:hover .gallery-card-link {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Art Galleries Section */
        .art-galleries {
            background: #111;
        }

        .art-gallery-grid {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            overflow-x: auto;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
            padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
            cursor: grab;
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
        }

        .art-gallery-grid::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        .art-gallery-grid:active {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        .art-gallery-item {
            flex: 0 0 280px;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            overflow: hidden;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            transition: all 0.4s ease;
        }

        .art-gallery-item:hover {
            transform: scale(1.02);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }

        .art-gallery-image {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform 0.6s ease;
        }

        .art-gallery-item:hover .art-gallery-image {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .art-gallery-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.95) 100%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }

        .art-gallery-item:hover .art-gallery-overlay {
            background: linear-gradient(transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.98) 100%);
        }

        .art-gallery-name {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 300;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        .art-gallery-cta {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #888;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .art-gallery-item:hover .art-gallery-cta {
            color: #fff;
        }

        .art-gallery-cta-arrow {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .art-gallery-item:hover .art-gallery-cta-arrow {
            transform: translateX(5px);
        }

        /* Featured Work Section */
        .featured {
            background: #0a0a0a;
        }

        .featured-filters {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .filter-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #666;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0.5rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .filter-btn:hover,
        .filter-btn.active {
            color: #fff;
            border-bottom-color: #fff;
        }

        .featured-carousel {
            position: relative;
        }

        .featured-track {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            overflow-x: auto;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
            padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .featured-track::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        .featured-image {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
            height: 400px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .featured-image:hover {
            transform: scale(1.02);
        }

        .featured-image img {
            height: 100%;
            width: auto;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        /* Contact Section */
        .contact {
            background: #111;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 8rem 4rem;
        }

        .contact-heading {
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: 200;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .contact-email {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: #888;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }

        .contact-email a {
            color: #fff;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .contact-email a:hover {
            border-color: #fff;
        }

        .social-links {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 2rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .social-link {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            color: #888;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .social-link:hover {
            color: #fff;
        }

        .social-icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* Footer */
        .footer {
            background: #050505;
            padding: 2rem 4rem;
            text-align: center;
            border-top: 1px solid #1a1a1a;
        }

        .footer-content {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        .footer-text {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #444;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .footer-location {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #333;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .nav {
                padding: 1rem 2rem;
            }

            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }

            .hero-title {
                font-size: 2.5rem;
                letter-spacing: 4px;
            }

            .hero-subtitle {
                font-size: 1rem;
            }

            .section {
                padding: 4rem 2rem;
            }

            .gallery-card {
                flex: 0 0 280px;
            }

            .art-gallery-item {
                flex: 0 0 220px;
            }

            .featured-image {
                height: 300px;
            }

            .footer-content {
                flex-direction: column;
                text-align: center;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="app-root">
        <!-- Navigation -->
        <nav class="nav" id="navbar">
            <div id="nav-logo-container"></div>
            <ul class="nav-links">
                <li><a onclick="handleNavClick('about')">About</a></li>
                <li><a onclick="handleNavClick('portfolio')">Portfolio</a></li>
                <li><a onclick="handleNavClick('art-galleries')">Prints</a></li>
                <li><a onclick="handleNavClick('featured')">Featured</a></li>
                <li><a onclick="handleNavClick('contact')">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        <!-- Hero Section -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero">
            <div class="hero-slideshow" id="hero-slideshow"></div>
            <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
            <div class="hero-content">
                <img class="hero-logo" id="hero-logo" src="" alt="Logo">
                <h1 class="hero-title" id="hero-title"></h1>
            </div>
            <div class="scroll-indicator">
                <span>Scroll</span>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- About Section -->
        <section class="section about" id="about">
            <div class="about-content">
                <p class="section-title">About</p>
                <h2 class="section-heading" id="about-name">The Photographer</h2>
                <p class="about-text" id="about-text"></p>
                <div class="about-principles" id="about-principles" style="display: none;">
                    <p class="about-principles-title">My Philosophy</p>
                    <p class="about-principles-text" id="principles-text"></p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Portfolio Client Galleries Section -->
        <section class="section portfolio" id="portfolio">
            <p class="section-title">Portfolio</p>
            <h2 class="section-heading">Client Galleries</h2>
            <div id="portfolio-galleries"></div>
        </section>

        <!-- Art Galleries Section -->
        <section class="section art-galleries" id="art-galleries" style="display: none;">
            <p class="section-title">Shop</p>
            <h2 class="section-heading">Fine Art Prints</h2>
            <div class="art-gallery-grid" id="art-gallery-grid"></div>
        </section>

        <!-- Featured Work Section -->
        <section class="section featured" id="featured">
            <p class="section-title">Featured Work</p>
            <h2 class="section-heading">Selected Images</h2>
            <div class="featured-filters" id="featured-filters"></div>
            <div class="featured-carousel">
                <div class="featured-track" id="featured-track"></div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Contact Section -->
        <section class="section contact" id="contact">
            <h2 class="contact-heading">Let's Work Together</h2>
            <p class="contact-email" id="contact-email"></p>
            <div class="social-links" id="social-links"></div>
        </section>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <footer class="footer">
            <div class="footer-content">
                <p class="footer-text" id="footer-text"></p>
                <p class="footer-location" id="footer-location"></p>
            </div>
        </footer>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        let currentState = null;
        let activeCategory = 'all';
        let heroSlideIndex = 0;
        let heroInterval = null;

        function render(data) {
            currentState = data;

            // Update navigation logo
            const navLogoContainer = document.getElementById('nav-logo-container');
            if (data.accountBrightLogo) {
                navLogoContainer.innerHTML = `<img class="nav-logo" src="${data.accountBrightLogo}" alt="${data.brandName}" draggable="false">`;
            } else {
                navLogoContainer.innerHTML = `<span class="nav-logo-text">${data.brandName}</span>`;
            }

            // Setup hero slideshow
            setupHeroSlideshow(data.brandLeadingMedia);

            // Update hero logo
            const heroLogo = document.getElementById('hero-logo');
            if (data.accountBrightLogo) {
                heroLogo.src = data.accountBrightLogo;
                heroLogo.style.display = 'block';
                heroLogo.draggable = false;
            } else {
                heroLogo.style.display = 'none';
            }

            // Update hero title
            document.getElementById('hero-title').textContent = data.brandName;

            // Update about section
            document.getElementById('about-name').textContent = data.accountName;
            document.getElementById('about-text').textContent = data.aboutText || '';

            if (data.myPhotographyPrinciples) {
                document.getElementById('about-principles').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('principles-text').textContent = data.myPhotographyPrinciples;
            }

            // Render portfolio client galleries by category
            renderPortfolioGalleries(data.portfolioClientGalleries);

            // Render art galleries
            renderArtGalleries(data.portfolioArtGalleries);

            // Render featured filters and images
            renderFeaturedSection(data.leadingMedia_ByPhotographyCategory);

            // Render contact section
            renderContactSection(data);

            // Update footer
            document.getElementById('footer-text').textContent = `© ${new Date().getFullYear()} ${data.brandName}. All rights reserved.`;
            if (data.country) {
                document.getElementById('footer-location').textContent = data.country;
            }

            // Initialize swipe support for all carousels
            setTimeout(initAllCarousels, 0);
        }

        function setupHeroSlideshow(images) {
            if (!images || images.length === 0) return;

            const slideshow = document.getElementById('hero-slideshow');
            const slidesHtml = images.slice(0, 10).map((img, i) =>
                `<div class="hero-slide ${i === 0 ? 'active' : ''}" style="background-image: url('${img}')"></div>`
            ).join('');
            slideshow.innerHTML = slidesHtml;

            // Start slideshow
            if (heroInterval) clearInterval(heroInterval);
            if (images.length > 1) {
                heroInterval = setInterval(() => {
                    const slides = slideshow.querySelectorAll('.hero-slide');
                    slides[heroSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');
                    heroSlideIndex = (heroSlideIndex + 1) % slides.length;
                    slides[heroSlideIndex].classList.add('active');
                }, 5000);
            }
        }

        function renderPortfolioGalleries(galleries) {
            if (!galleries || galleries.length === 0) return;

            // Group galleries by category
            const byCategory = {};
            galleries.forEach(gallery => {
                const cat = gallery.category || 'Other';
                if (!byCategory[cat]) byCategory[cat] = [];
                byCategory[cat].push(gallery);
            });

            const container = document.getElementById('portfolio-galleries');
            let html = '';

            Object.entries(byCategory).forEach(([category, categoryGalleries], catIndex) => {
                const carouselId = `carousel-${catIndex}`;
                html += `
                    <div class="portfolio-category">
                        <div class="portfolio-category-header">
                            <h3 class="portfolio-category-title">${category}</h3>
                            <div class="carousel-controls">
                                <button class="carousel-btn" onclick="scrollCarousel('${carouselId}', -1)">‹</button>
                                <button class="carousel-btn" onclick="scrollCarousel('${carouselId}', 1)">›</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="carousel-container">
                            <div class="carousel-track" id="${carouselId}">
                                ${categoryGalleries.map(gallery => renderGalleryCard(gallery)).join('')}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });

            container.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function renderGalleryCard(gallery) {
            const badgeClass = gallery.isSneakPeak ? 'sneak-peek' : (gallery.isPublic ? 'public' : 'private');
            const badgeText = gallery.isSneakPeak ? 'Sneak Peek' : (gallery.isPublic ? 'Public' : 'Private');
            const date = parseDate(gallery.datePublished);
            const dateStr = date ? date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }) : '';

            return `
                <div class="gallery-card" onclick="handleGalleryClick('${gallery.galleryUrl}', '${escapeHtml(gallery.title)}', ${gallery.isPublic})">
                    <img class="gallery-card-image" src="${gallery.imageUrl}" alt="${escapeHtml(gallery.title)}" loading="lazy" draggable="false">
                    <div class="gallery-card-overlay">
                        <span class="gallery-card-badge ${badgeClass}">${badgeText}</span>
                        <h4 class="gallery-card-title">${escapeHtml(gallery.title)}</h4>
                        <div class="gallery-card-meta">
                            <span class="gallery-card-category">${gallery.category}</span>
                            ${dateStr ? `<span>${dateStr}</span>` : ''}
                            <span class="gallery-card-link">
                                <span>Open</span>
                                <span>↗</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function renderArtGalleries(artGalleries) {
            const section = document.getElementById('art-galleries');
            const container = document.getElementById('art-gallery-grid');

            if (!artGalleries || artGalleries.length === 0) {
                section.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            section.style.display = 'block';

            const html = artGalleries.map(gallery => `
                <div class="art-gallery-item" onclick="handleArtGalleryClick('${gallery.galleryUrl}', '${escapeHtml(gallery.name)}')">
                    <img class="art-gallery-image" src="${gallery.imageUrl}" alt="${escapeHtml(gallery.name)}" loading="lazy" draggable="false">
                    <div class="art-gallery-overlay">
                        <h4 class="art-gallery-name">${escapeHtml(gallery.name)}</h4>
                        <span class="art-gallery-cta">
                            <span>Shop Prints</span>
                            <span class="art-gallery-cta-arrow">→</span>
                        </span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            container.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function renderFeaturedSection(mediaByCategory) {
            if (!mediaByCategory) return;

            const categories = Object.keys(mediaByCategory);
            if (categories.length === 0) return;

            // Render filters
            const filtersHtml = `
                <button class="filter-btn ${activeCategory === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="filterFeatured('all')">All</button>
                ${categories.map(cat =>
                    `<button class="filter-btn ${activeCategory === cat ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="filterFeatured('${cat}')">${cat}</button>`
                ).join('')}
            `;
            document.getElementById('featured-filters').innerHTML = filtersHtml;

            // Render images
            renderFeaturedImages(mediaByCategory, activeCategory);
        }

        function renderFeaturedImages(mediaByCategory, filter) {
            let images = [];
            if (filter === 'all') {
                Object.values(mediaByCategory).forEach(catImages => {
                    images = images.concat(catImages.slice(0, 5));
                });
            } else {
                images = mediaByCategory[filter] || [];
            }

            const track = document.getElementById('featured-track');
            track.innerHTML = images.map(img => `
                <div class="featured-image" onclick="handleImageClick('${img}')">
                    <img src="${img}" alt="Featured work" loading="lazy" draggable="false">
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }

        function renderContactSection(data) {
            // Email
            const emailHtml = data.serviceEmail
                ? `<a href="mailto:${data.serviceEmail}" onclick="handleContactClick('email')">${data.serviceEmail}</a>`
                : '';
            document.getElementById('contact-email').innerHTML = emailHtml;

            // Social links
            const social = data.socialHandle || {};
            let socialHtml = '';

            if (social.ig) {
                socialHtml += `
                    <a class="social-link" href="${social.ig}" target="_blank" onclick="handleContactClick('instagram')">
                        <span class="social-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
                                <path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span>Instagram</span>
                    </a>
                `;
            }

            if (social.facebook) {
                socialHtml += `
                    <a class="social-link" href="${social.facebook}" target="_blank" onclick="handleContactClick('facebook')">
                        <span class="social-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
                                <path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span>Facebook</span>
                    </a>
                `;
            }

            if (social.x) {
                socialHtml += `
                    <a class="social-link" href="${social.x}" target="_blank" onclick="handleContactClick('twitter')">
                        <span class="social-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
                                <path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-5.214-6.817L4.99 21.75H1.68l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.713 6.231zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span>X / Twitter</span>
                    </a>
                `;
            }

            if (social.www) {
                socialHtml += `
                    <a class="social-link" href="${social.www}" target="_blank" onclick="handleContactClick('website')">
                        <span class="social-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
                                <path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-1 17.93c-3.95-.49-7-3.85-7-7.93 0-.62.08-1.21.21-1.79L9 15v1c0 1.1.9 2 2 2v1.93zm6.9-2.54c-.26-.81-1-1.39-1.9-1.39h-1v-3c0-.55-.45-1-1-1H8v-2h2c.55 0 1-.45 1-1V7h2c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2v-.41c2.93 1.19 5 4.06 5 7.41 0 2.08-.8 3.97-2.1 5.39z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </span>
                        <span>Website</span>
                    </a>
                `;
            }

            document.getElementById('social-links').innerHTML = socialHtml;
        }

        function parseDate(dateStr) {
            if (!dateStr) return null;
            // Handle .NET date format: /Date(timestamp)/
            const match = dateStr.match(/\/Date\((\d+)\)\//);
            if (match) {
                return new Date(parseInt(match[1]));
            }
            return new Date(dateStr);
        }

        function escapeHtml(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return str.replace(/[&<>"']/g, char => ({
                '&': '&',
                '<': '<',
                '>': '>',
                '"': '"',
                "'": '''
            }[char]));
        }

        // Touch/Swipe and Mouse Drag support for carousels
        function initSwipeSupport(track) {
            let isDown = false;
            let startX;
            let scrollLeft;
            let startTime;
            let hasMoved = false;

            // Prevent default drag on images inside track
            track.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img => {
                img.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => e.preventDefault());
            });

            // Mouse events
            track.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                isDown = true;
                hasMoved = false;
                track.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
                startX = e.pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                scrollLeft = track.scrollLeft;
                startTime = Date.now();
                e.preventDefault(); // Prevent text selection and image drag
            });

            track.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                isDown = false;
                track.style.cursor = 'grab';
            });

            track.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
                const wasDragging = isDown && hasMoved;
                isDown = false;
                track.style.cursor = 'grab';

                // Add momentum scrolling
                const endTime = Date.now();
                const timeDiff = endTime - startTime;
                if (timeDiff < 300 && hasMoved) {
                    const x = e.pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                    const walk = (x - startX);
                    const velocity = walk / timeDiff;
                    track.scrollBy({ left: -velocity * 200, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }

                // Prevent click events if we were dragging
                if (wasDragging) {
                    const preventClick = (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    };
                    track.addEventListener('click', preventClick, { capture: true, once: true });
                }
            });

            track.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (!isDown) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                const x = e.pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                const walk = (x - startX) * 1.5;
                if (Math.abs(walk) > 5) hasMoved = true;
                track.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
            });

            // Touch events
            let touchStartX;
            let touchScrollLeft;
            let touchStartTime;
            let touchHasMoved = false;

            track.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                touchStartX = e.touches[0].pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                touchScrollLeft = track.scrollLeft;
                touchStartTime = Date.now();
                touchHasMoved = false;
            }, { passive: true });

            track.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                const x = e.touches[0].pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                const walk = (x - touchStartX) * 1.5;
                if (Math.abs(walk) > 5) touchHasMoved = true;
                track.scrollLeft = touchScrollLeft - walk;
            }, { passive: true });

            track.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                const endTime = Date.now();
                const timeDiff = endTime - touchStartTime;

                // Add momentum for quick swipes
                if (timeDiff < 300 && touchHasMoved && e.changedTouches.length > 0) {
                    const x = e.changedTouches[0].pageX - track.offsetLeft;
                    const walk = (x - touchStartX);
                    const velocity = walk / timeDiff;
                    track.scrollBy({ left: -velocity * 200, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            }, { passive: true });

            // Set initial cursor
            track.style.cursor = 'grab';
        }

        // Initialize swipe on all carousels after render
        function initAllCarousels() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.carousel-track, .featured-track, .art-gallery-grid').forEach(track => {
                initSwipeSupport(track);
            });
        }

        // Global carousel scroll function
        window.scrollCarousel = function(carouselId, direction) {
            const track = document.getElementById(carouselId);
            const scrollAmount = 340 * direction;
            track.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
        };

        // Global filter function
        window.filterFeatured = function(category) {
            activeCategory = category;
            if (currentState) {
                renderFeaturedSection(currentState.leadingMedia_ByPhotographyCategory);
            }
            window.myop_cta_handler('category-selected', { category: category });
        };

        // Navigation click handler
        window.handleNavClick = function(section) {
            document.getElementById(section).scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
            window.myop_cta_handler('navigation-clicked', { section: section });
        };

        // Gallery click handler - opens in new tab
        window.handleGalleryClick = function(galleryUrl, title, isPublic) {
            window.open(galleryUrl, '_blank');
            window.myop_cta_handler('gallery-clicked', { galleryUrl: galleryUrl, title: title, isPublic: isPublic });
        };

        // Art gallery click handler - opens in new tab
        window.handleArtGalleryClick = function(galleryUrl, name) {
            window.open(galleryUrl, '_blank');
            window.myop_cta_handler('art-gallery-clicked', { galleryUrl: galleryUrl, name: name });
        };

        // Image click handler
        window.handleImageClick = function(imageUrl) {
            window.myop_cta_handler('image-clicked', { imageUrl: imageUrl });
        };

        // Contact click handler
        window.handleContactClick = function(method) {
            window.myop_cta_handler('contact-clicked', { method: method });
        };

        // Navbar scroll effect
        document.getElementById('app-root').addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
            if (this.scrollTop > 50) {
                navbar.classList.add('scrolled');
            } else {
                navbar.classList.remove('scrolled');
            }
        });

        // Public API
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentState;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
            console.log('CTA:', action_id, payload);
        };
    })();
    </script>
